name: Claude Code
summary: Route Claude Code's normal Anthropic HTTPS traffic through DAM.

commands.label: Run Claude Code through explicit-proxy fallback

notes: Claude Code keeps its normal Anthropic API endpoint; Network Extension capture is primary and explicit proxy remains a fallback for source builds and unsupported environments.
`dam integrations apply claude-code` writes fallback proxy env settings to Claude Code settings JSON with a rollback record.
Use `--target-path .claude/settings.local.json` for a project-local Claude Code setting instead of the default user setting.
The apply step removes the old DAM-owned ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL override so Claude talks to the real Anthropic host.
Claude Code keeps provider authentication; DAM only receives and forwards the request headers.
